operations.title: Search Repository Context
operations.summary: Search bounded GitHub repository issues and pull requests without exposing raw repository tools.

inputs.name: owner
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for owner when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: repo
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for repo when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: query
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for query when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for limit when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded GitHub provider options such as selected fields or pagination. Must not bypass repo scope, approval, or secret policy.
inputs.clarification_hint: Do not ask for backend_options unless the user explicitly needs provider-specific controls.
